// Who We Are

About CAD Bridge

CAD Bridge is a freelance engineering detailing service specializing in PEB and Structural Steel detailing. We support fabricators, contractors, consultants, and engineering companies with accurate detailing and on-time project delivery.


Our mission is to provide reliable detailing solutions that reduce fabrication errors and improve project efficiency — delivering drawings your team can build with confidence.

PEB ExpertiseEnd-to-end PEB detailing
On-Time DeliveryDeadlines we keep
Global ClientsWorldwide project support
Quality AssuredMulti-layer QA review

// What We Deliver

Our Services

We provide complete detailing solutions from shop drawings to erection plans, tailored for fabricators and contractors worldwide.

PEB

PEB Detailing

Complete detailing solutions for Pre-Engineered Buildings — from primary framing, secondary members to connections and cladding.

Get Quote
Structural

Structural Steel Detailing

Accurate fabrication drawings for structural steel projects, coordinated for smooth execution on the shop floor and at the site.

Get Quote
Shop Drawings

Shop Drawings

Detailed manufacturing drawings with all dimensions, weld specs, and part marks — ready for the fabrication floor with zero ambiguity.

Get Quote
Erection

Erection Drawings

Clear and organized erection plans that guide site installation precisely — minimizing on-site errors and costly rework.

Get Quote
Anchor Bolts

Anchor Bolt Layouts

Precise anchor bolt setting-out drawings that ensure correct foundation placement before the concrete pour — no surprises.

Get Quote
BOM

Bill of Materials (BOM)

Detailed material lists organized for fabrication and procurement, minimizing waste, over-ordering, and production delays.

Get Quote
